name: PLS Auto, Inc.
description_short: PLS Auto is a buy-here-pay-here used car dealership in Indianapolis offering in-house financing, service, and maintenance to customers with challenged credit.
description_long:
PLS Auto was founded by entrepreneurs with over 25 years of experience in consumer finance who recognized a gap in the used car market. They observed that customers with poor credit were routinely denied fair service and left stranded without reliable transportation. The company was launched with the explicit mission to answer "yes" to four core questions: affordability, financing options, service availability, and quality customer experience.

The dealership operates as a buy-here-pay-here model, meaning they handle vehicle sales, in-house financing, and maintenance all under one roof at their Indianapolis location (4701 W 38th St). Customers can browse their inventory, apply for financing with flexible down payment and payment plan options, and access their certified service department for repairs and maintenance. All vehicles come with a two-year or 24,000-mile limited warranty, and the company offers free service towing to keep customers mobile.

What distinguishes PLS Auto is their deliberate focus on underserved customers with credit challenges. Rather than operating as a traditional lender or dealership, they've integrated financial services directly into car sales to simplify the process and reduce barriers to approval. Their service department staffed by certified state technicians provides hands-on support to ensure vehicles stay roadworthy. This vertical integration—handling sales, financing, and service in-house—is designed to eliminate gaps where customers often get abandoned by traditional dealers.

However, prospective customers should note that buy-here-pay-here dealerships typically charge significantly higher interest rates than conventional auto lenders, and the company does not publicly disclose APR, payment terms, or other key financing details on their website. The limited warranty (2 years/24,000 miles) is shorter than typical manufacturer coverage. The dealership's target demographic and business model suggest this is intended for subprime borrowers with few other financing options.
address: 4701 W 38th St ste a, Indianapolis, IN 46254

company_info.headquarters: 4701 W 38th St ste a, Indianapolis, IN 46254

pros: In-house service department with certified state technicians eliminates reliance on third-party repair shops
Two-year or 24,000-mile limited warranty included on all vehicles
Flexible down payment and payment plan options tailored to individual financial situations
Free service towing keeps customers mobile if vehicle breaks down
Fast and friendly approval process marketed as responsive to underserved credit profiles
Single-location integrated model (sales, financing, service) simplifies the buying and ownership experience
Founders' 25+ years of consumer finance experience suggests operational stability
cons: APR and actual financing terms not disclosed on website, typical for buy-here-pay-here dealers who charge significantly higher rates than prime lenders
Limited warranty (2 years/24,000 miles) is shorter than mainstream auto financing options
Buy-here-pay-here model carries higher default risk; payment lapses can result in vehicle disablement
Only one physical location (Indianapolis), limiting geographic accessibility
No transparency on vehicle pricing, quality standards, or recondition practices
best_for: Customers with poor or challenged credit unable to qualify for traditional auto financing
Buyers seeking integrated sales, financing, and service at a single dealership to simplify the process
Indianapolis-area residents who need affordable used vehicles with in-house maintenance support
Individuals prioritizing service reliability and warranty coverage over lowest price
diagnosis: PLS Auto is best suited for Indianapolis-area customers with challenged credit who need reliable transportation and want an integrated dealer experience. The primary caveat is that buy-here-pay-here financing typically carries substantially higher interest rates and stricter terms than conventional auto loans, and the company does not disclose APR or payment details upfront—prospective buyers should contact them directly for full cost disclosure before committing.
services: Used car sales and inventory browsing
In-house auto financing with flexible payment plans
Fast and friendly loan approval process
Two-year or 24,000-mile limited warranty on all vehicles
Contact and scheduling via phone (463-282-7443 sales, 317-677-1422 service) or online form
